The Process

How Vehicle Shipping Works

Our streamlined 5-step process makes shipping your vehicle simple, transparent, and stress-free.

01

Request a Quote

Fill out our simple online form or call us with your vehicle details, pickup location, and destination. We'll provide a free, no-obligation quote within minutes.

02

Carrier Assignment

Once you accept your quote, we tap into our nationwide network of vetted, insured carriers to find the best match for your route, timeline, and vehicle type.

03

Pickup & Inspection

Your assigned carrier arrives at the pickup location, performs a thorough vehicle inspection, documents the condition, and securely loads your vehicle for transport.

04

Safe Transport

Your vehicle is transported with care across the country. We keep you informed throughout the journey with status updates and estimated delivery windows.

05

Delivery & Confirmation

Your vehicle arrives at the destination. A final inspection is completed, and you confirm delivery. It's that simple — safe, reliable, and hassle-free.

RASTAMAN LOGISTICS

Licensed auto transport broker specializing in safe, reliable nationwide vehicle shipping across the United States.

Services

  • Open Auto Transport
  • Enclosed Transport
  • Door-to-Door Shipping
  • Expedited Shipping
